description: Perform a network analysis on the Big Five Personality Traits dataset (/home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFivePersonalityTraits.csv) to understand the connections between personality dimensions. Analyze the variables Neuroticism, Extraversion, Openness, Agreeableness, and Conscientiousness using the EBICglasso estimator. Ensure the analysis includes a Centrality Plot and Weights Matrix. Save the JASP project to /home/ga/Documents/JASP/BigFiveNetwork.jasp. Create a text report at /home/ga/Documents/JASP/network_report.txt identifying the variable with the highest Strength centrality, the variable with the highest Betweenness centrality, the pair of variables with the strongest edge weight (positive or negative), and the total number of non-zero edges in the network.
